name: io.github.taisly/agent
description: Taisly MCP server for AI agent social media video publishing to TikTok, Instagram Reels, YouTube Shorts, X, and Facebook.

environmentVariables.name: TAISLY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Your Taisly API key from Taisly Settings.

environmentVariables.name: TAISLY_API_URL
environmentVariables.description: Optional custom Taisly API URL. Defaults to https://app.taisly.com/api/private.
